name: python3-bcrypt
title: python3-bcrypt
description:
password hashing library for Python 3
bcrypt is a Python module which provides a password hashing method based on
the Blowfish password hashing algorithm, as described in
"A Future-Adaptable Password Scheme" by Niels Provos and David Mazieres:
http://static.usenix.org/events/usenix99/provos.html.
.
This package provides the bcrypt Python module for Python 3.x.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-bcrypt because password hashing library for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-bcrypt as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-bcrypt with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-bcrypt --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
